message:
feat(type-inference): Add dict widening and None value type fixes

- InferDictValueType now returns ?void for all-None dicts instead of
  @TypeOf(null) which has no size and can't be stored in hash maps
- Add dict literal codegen handling for null to ?void conversion
- Add widenDictAware() in TypeInferrer for special dict widening:
  when two dicts have same key type but different value types,
  widen to dict with pyvalue values instead of returning .unknown
- nativeTypeToZigStr() now returns "?void" for .none type

This is infrastructure for handling Python's dynamic dict reassignment
where the same variable can hold dicts with different value types.
Full codegen support for widened types is future work.
